title: Agentic-R: Retriever Training for Agentic Search

defines.name: Agentic-R
defines.definition: A retriever training framework designed specifically for agentic search that optimizes passages using both local query relevance and global answer correctness in an iterative agent-retriever loop.

problem: Existing retrievers for agentic search rely on similarity or single-turn utility signals and do not account for multi-turn reasoning or the interaction between the retriever and the evolving search agent.
